emails.body: RE: FW: SP1 JDP MOU Signed I know Beth Perlman is a VP of Enron Corp. =01) that=01,s why I suggested s= he sign=20 the MOU instead of Philippe in my email to you yesterday. I don=01,t under= stand=20 your emphasis on the word =01&is=018. Bob Ward Manager, IT Development ext. 54409

emails.subject: RE: FW: SP1 JDP MOU Signed
emails.body: My emphasis on IS was just that she IS a VP of Enron Corp., not Enron Net= =20 Works (which we found out yesterday she was not an officer of). =09Bob Ward/ENRON@enronXgate =0906/07/2001 03:30 PM =09=09=20 =09=09
